data.title: Dow drops over 300 points, GM posts strong Q4 earnings, with NASDAQ up 0.56% and S&P 500 rising 0.23%. GM reports $2.51 EPS.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, as the Dow Jones index dropped by more than 300 points to 49,074.36, a decline of 0.68%, while the NASDAQ increased by 0.56% to 23,732.71. The S&P 500 also saw a rise of 0.23% to 6,966.23. Information technology shares rose by 0.9%, while health care stocks fell by 1% on Tuesday. General Motors Company (NYSE: GM) reported positive fourth-quarter earnings, with adjusted earnings per share at $2.51, a 30.4% increase from the previous year, surpassing the analyst estimate of $2.20. The quarterly sales of $45.287 billion slightly missed the expected $45.804 billion. General Motors also announced an increase in its dividend and a share repurchase program. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Alkira appoints S&P Global's Guru Ramamoorthy to advisory board to accelerate networking strategy.
data.description: On Jan. 27, 2026, in San Jose, California, Alkira, a top provider of Network Infrastructure as a Service (NIaaS), revealed that Guru Ramamoorthy, the Global Head of Cloud & Infrastructure at S&P Global, has joined their advisory board. This addition aims to enhance the company's strategic direction and expertise.
S&P Cotality Case-Shiller Index Reports Annual Gain In November 2025

data.title: Obagi Medical and Alpha Aesthetic Partners team up for ALOHA program to drive real-world evidence with Obagi® saypha® MagIQ™. Alpha chosen as first Medspa platform partner.
data.description: Alpha has been chosen as the initial Medspa platform partner due to its dedication to innovation, education, and overcoming obstacles. This decision is a testament to Alpha's focus on these areas, reflecting positively on the company's reputation in the industry. This partnership marks the beginning of what promises to be a fruitful collaboration, with Alpha positioned as a key player in the Medspa platform sector. The selection of Alpha underscores the company's important role in shaping the future landscape of Medspa platforms, with potential for significant growth and success in the industry.

data.title: EPSO-G to announce 2026 operating results and convene AGM for shareholders. Dates TBA.
data.description: UAB EPSO-G is set to release its operating results for 2026 and convene the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The company will first unveil its financial performance for the year and then hold the AGM to discuss key matters. This planned sequence denotes the importance of transparency and shareholder engagement in the company's operations.

data.title: RTX stock rises as higher demand boosts Q4 sales to $24.238B, EPS at $1.19. Cash flow at $4.165B, backlog hits $268B.
data.description: RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) posted strong fourth-quarter 2025 results with sales totaling $24.238 billion, marking a 12% increase from the previous year. GAAP diluted EPS stood at $1.19, showcasing growth from $1.10 in the prior-year quarter, with adjusted EPS rising 1% to $1.55. The company's cash flow figures were robust, with operating cash flow at $4.165 billion, free cash flow at $3.195 billion, and capital expenditures totaling $1.0 billion. RTX's backlog hit $268 billion, split between $161 billion of commercial and $107 billion from defense. Additionally, RTX concluded the sale of Collins' Simmonds Precision Products business. Collins Aerospace, a segment of RTX, saw fourth-quarter sales of $7.736 billion, reflecting a 3% increase. Overall, RTX exceeded analyst predictions, driving its share price higher post-announcement.

data.title: Huey Magoo's offers family meals at $7.50/person, Family Four Pack feeds 4, with $2 game day bundles.
data.description: ORLANDO, Florida - On January 27, 2026, Huey Magoo's, a popular fast-casual chicken tenders brand, announced the launch of a new offer - the Family Four Pack that is designed to serve four individuals. Alongside this, they also introduced Two Game Day Bundles. Additionally, customers can now enjoy a refreshing Passion Fruit Lemonade. Huey Magoo's, famous for their premium chicken tenders, is offering these new options to cater to the varying preferences of their customers.

data.title: Global Wellness Summit predicts 10 trends for 2026: backlash against over-optimization, focus on pleasure & joy, women in longevity, and more.
data.description: By 2026, a shift away from excessive optimization is anticipated, with a renewed focus on pleasure and joy. Women are set to achieve dedicated lanes in longevity and sports. The concept of longevity is projected to branch out into real estate and beauty sectors. Wellness initiatives will take on critical challenges including disaster preparedness and microplastics. Anticipated changes highlight a movement towards balanced living and addressing pressing global issues.

data.title: EIB supports Minesto in developing the EU's first Tidal Energy Dragon Farm. Minesto selected for investment advisory under the EIB's PDA program.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on January 27, 2026, Minesto, a prominent ocean energy developer, has received specialized investment advisory assistance from the European Investment Bank (EIB) through the Project Development Assistance (PDA) scheme. This program aims to provide additional support to promote sustainable energy projects.

data.title: November 2025 saw S&P Case-Shiller Index report 1.4% annual gain in US National Home Price NSA Index, amidst consumer inflation of 2.7%.
data.description: In November, the S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller U.S. National Home Price NSA Index reported a 1.4% annual increase, matching the previous month's results. Despite the rise in home prices, real values decreased due to consumer inflation standing at 2.7%, which was 1.3 percentage points higher than the National Index gain. Regional disparities continued to be evident as...

data.title: iXCells Biotechnologies and Rosebud Biosciences partner to advance organoid-based models for rare diseases, enhancing drug safety.
data.description: In San Diego, iXCells Biotechnologies, a prominent provider of human cell-based solutions and custom iPSC services, has partnered with Rosebud Biosciences, a pioneer in organoid development and complex 3D biology. Their collaboration aims to create a personalized human-centered method for forecasting drug safety and guiding translational decisions for rare diseases. This partnership comes as iXCells enters a new stage of development, broadening the Company's custom integrated platform.

data.title: Argano acquires Pharosity Consulting, specializing in Gross-to-Net (GTN) and more, enhancing its life sciences transformation platform.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Argano, a leading Global Specialist Consultancy dedicated to optimizing High-Performance Business Operations through AI-driven strategies, has confirmed its acquisition of Pharosity Consulting, Inc. The acquisition will bring in Pharosity's specialized knowledge in areas such as Gross-to-Net (GTN), government pricing, commercial contracting, and advanced analytics tailored for the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sector. This move underscores Argano's commitment to enhancing its offerings and market presence within the industry.

data.title: Ashland Capital Partners sells KBK Industries, a US tank manufacturer, after 19-year partnership, based in Houston.
data.description: Chicago-based private investment firm Ashland Capital Partners has recently sold KBK Industries, a leading manufacturer of fiberglass and steel tanks and separation equipment. This marks the end of a prosperous 19-year partnership between Ashland and KBK. KBK, headquartered in Houston, Texas, is renowned for its high-quality liquid storage solutions.

data.title: Essential Income REIT by ExchangeRight dominates Blue Vault's Q3 2025 ratings in Non-Traded REIT industry review.
data.description: ExchangeRight, based in Pasadena, California, has revealed that its Essential Income Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) has garnered a leading position in Blue Vault’s Q3 Non-Traded REIT Industry Review.

data.title: SSV Network introduces cSSV token for ETH staking, with a new protocol overhaul and balance accounting for post-Pectra validators.
data.description: SSV Network has announced a significant protocol update by transitioning to Ethereum-based fees. This overhaul includes the introduction of a new cSSV staking token and the implementation of effective balance tracking methods for validators following the Pectra era. The changes are set to enhance the network's efficiency and offer improved staking opportunities to users.

data.title: Democrat Jennifer Homendy leads the National Transportation Safety Board, addressing the fatal crash that claimed 67 lives.
data.description: The chairwoman of the National Transportation Safety Board, Jennifer Homendy, known for her strong opinions, will be the focus of attention at a meeting discussing the Washington, D.C., crash that resulted in the tragic deaths of 67 individuals.

data.title: Nerd Apply secures $3.2M in seed funding to enhance outcome-focused college counseling services.
data.description: Nerd Apply has secured a $3.2 million seed round to enhance outcome-focused college counseling services. The funding was announced on January 27, 2026. This investment is expected to drive the growth and development of Nerd Apply's innovative approach. The corrected version of the news release was issued by the company through PR Newswire, providing more insights and updates.

data.title: Special Opportunities Fund to pay year-end distribution of $14.9506 in cash and stock to common stockholders.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Special Opportunities Fund, Inc. (NYSE: SPE) disclosed that shares of the Fund's common stock will be issued to common stockholders of record as of December 29, 2025, at a price of $14.9506 per share. This amount reflects the volume-weighted average trading price of the Fund's common stock on January 20, 21, and 22, 2026. The payment for these shares is scheduled for January 30, 2026.
